headline: Hegseth 'Kill Everybody' Boat BBQ 💥🚤 Sparks WAR CRIME Probe 🔥🍖
text:
US Lawmaker SIMPS 🤡📜 DEMANDING DEETS from Trump 🍊👑 ADMIN on Hegseth's SUS Venezuelan DRUG BOAT STRIKES 🚤💣 – WaPo 📰 spilling TEA ☕ that SECOND HIT 🔥 killed SURVIVORS 🛟 after initial BOOM 💥 on Sept 2, cuz Pete 'Kill EVERYBODY' Hegseth 🪖😤 barked orders like a Rambo reject! Hegseth SCREAMS 'FAKE NEWS' 🚫📰 but Trump on AF1 ✈️💨 goes 'I BELIEVE HIM 100% 🫡' – Daddy Don backing his BOY 100% while Congress CUCKS 🐔🔍 launch BIPARTISAN PROBE! Senate Armed Services ROGER WICKER 🧔 + JACK REED 🤝 vow 'VIGOROUS OVERSIGHT' 👀📋 on SOUTHCOM Caribbean CAPERS 🏝️🚢, House crew piling on for FULL ACCOUNTING 📊💰!

80+ DEAD 😵💀 since early Sept in ANTI-NARC OPS 🌿🚫 off Venezuela/Colombia – Trump team claims SELF-DEFENSE 🛡️ cuz BOATS hauling ICKY DRUGS to Uncle Sam 🇺🇸🍔, calling it NON-INTERNATIONAL ARMED CONFLICT ⚔️📜 with TRAFFICKERS linked to TERROR GROUPS 🧨👹! But GENEVA CONVENTIONS 😇🚫 FORBID blasting WOUNDED dudes – gotta APPREHEND & NURSE 'em 🏥🛡️, not BBQ survivors like Hegseth's alleged 'SPOKEN DIRECTIVE' 💬🔪! Tim Kaine DEM 🚫 screams 'WAR CRIME if TRUE' on CBS Face the Nation 📺😱, Mike Turner GOP 🤖 admits 'ILLEGAL ACT' if follow-up happened – Congress too BLIND 🐘🦅 without INTEL!

Hegseth X-RANTS 📱🔥: 'LAWFUL KILLS on TERROR TRAFFICKERS 🩸⚖️!' Trump whispers 'We'll LOOK INTO IT 👀' but NO SECOND STRIKE VIBES from him – meanwhile VENEZUELA Maduro 🤡🌹 RAGES in National Assembly, vowing THEIR OWN PROBE 🚨 and accusing US of TOPPLING PLOTS 💥🏰! Trump admits PHONE CALL 📞 with Nico but 'NEITHER GOOD NOR BAD' 😏 – spicy DEETS? CLASSIFIED 🕵️‍♂️🔒! US skips UN Law of the Sea ✒️🌊 but plays NICE with 'HOT PURSUIT' 🚀🏃 exceptions – Prof Moffett schooled BBC: 'NON-LETHAL FORCE bby, NO BOAT MASSACRES' 🚤❌💀! Hegseth's 'EVERY TRAFFICKER DIES' mantra got LAWMAKERS SWEATING 😰⚖️ – is it HEROIC DRUG WAR 🎖️ or CARIBBEAN CRIME SCENE 🩸🏝️? Congress gonna GRILL Pete like a drug boat patty 🍔🔥 while Trump simps HARD 🫡🍑! Venezuela seething MADURO MODE 😡🇻🇪, WaPo unverified but SALTY AF 🧂 – STAY TUNED for OVERSIGHT ORGY 💦📈‼️
